активная кнопка с затемнением как у выбранных фильтров */\n.my_tasks_active {\n    filter: brightness(0.85);\n    border-color: var(--border-color);\n}\n\n/* Тёмная тема — активная кнопка с цветным фоном */\n.wrapper.dark-theme .my_tasks_active {\n    background-color: var(--button-active-bg);\n    color: #e0e0e0;\n    border-color: var(--button-active-bg);\n    filter: none;\n}\n\n/* Переключатель темы */\n.theme_toggle_container {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    margin-right: 2rem;\n}\n\n.theme_toggle {\n    position: relative;\n    display: flex;\n    width: 5.4rem;\n    height: 2.8rem;\n    background-color: var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 2.8rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: background-color 0.3s ease;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 0;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.theme_toggle.active {\n    background-color: var(--link-color);\n    justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n.theme_toggle::before {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    width: 2.4rem;\n    height: 2.4rem;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    transition: transform 0.3s ease;\n    margin: 0.06rem;\n    left: 0.2rem;\n    background-color: white;\n    background-image: url(${g});\n    background-repeat: no-repeat;\n    background-position: center;\n    background-size: 60%;\n}\n\n.theme_toggle.active::before {\n    transform: translateX(2.6rem);\n    background-image: url(${u});\n}\n\n/* Логотип-ссылка */\n.logo_link {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    margin-left: auto;\n    margin-right: auto;\n    opacity: 0.75;\n    transition: opacity 0.2s ease;\n    text-decoration: none;\n}\n\n.logo_link img {\n    max-height: 2.8rem;\n    object-fit: contain;\n}\n\n.logo_link:hover {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n/* кнопка добавления задач +++ */\n.add_task {\n    min-width: 26px;\n    min-height: 26px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    border: none;\n    margin: 1rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.add_task * {\n    pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n.add_task:hover {\n    background-color: #8c8c8c;\n    transform: rotate(90deg);\n}\n\n.add_task:hover svg path {\n    stroke: white;\n}\n\n.add_task:active {\n    transform: scale(0.9) rotate(90deg);\n}\n\n.add_task svg {\n    width: 16px;\n    height: 16px;\n}\n\n/* кнопка добавления задач --- */\n\n/* Стили для Drag & Drop подсветки */\n.kanban-block--dragover {\n    background-color: var(--dragover-bg);\n    /* Например, светло-голубой фон */\n    /* border: 2px dashed #91d5ff; Пунктирная граница */\n    outline: 2px dashed var(--dragover-border);\n    /* Используем outline вместо border */\n    outline-offset: -2px;\n    /* Опционально: сдвигает контур внутрь, чтобы он был внутри padding */\n    transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;\n    /* Плавный переход */\n}\n\n/* Запрещённая зона для drop при группировке по проектам */\n.kanban-block--drop-forbidden {\n    background-color: rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.1) !important;\n    outline: 2px dashed #dc3545 !important;\n    outline-offset: -2px;\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    position: relative;\n}\n\n/* Тёмная тема — запрещённая зона */\n.wrapper.dark-theme .kanban-block--drop-forbidden {\n    background-color: rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.15) !important;\n}\n\n/* Иконка запрета */\n.kanban-block--drop-forbidden::after {\n    content: "✕";\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 50%;\n    left: 50%;\n    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);\n    font-size: 2.4rem;\n    color: #dc3545;\n    opacity: 0.4;\n    pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n/* ========== DROPDOWN ГРУППИРОВКИ (pill-стиль как у проектов) ========== */\n.grouping_dropdown {\n    position: relative;\n    display: inline-block;\n}\n\n.grouping_toggle {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    padding: 0.4rem 1rem;\n font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    -webkit-user-select: none;\n    user-select: none;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n/* замена gap на margin для совместимости с 1С visibility: visible;\n    transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n.grouping_option {\n    padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n s=e.querySelector(".card__photo");s&&(void 0!==t&&s.src!==t&&(s.src=t),void 0!==o&&s.alt!==o&&(s.alt=o,s.title=o));const l=e.querySelector(".card__text span");l&&void 0!==a&&l.textContent!==a&&(l.textContent=a),void 0!==i&&(e.getAttribute("fullNameObjectTask")||"")!==i&&e.setAttribute("fullNameObjectTask",i)})(o,e.card__link_href,e.card__link_name,e.card__photo,e.alt,e.card__text,e.fullnameobjecttask),r&&((e,n)=>{let r=null;if("executor"===j){const t=Array.from(e.classList).find(e=>e.startsWith("user")&&!e.startsWith("user_name"));if(t){const e=document.querySelector('.group[data-executor-id="'+t+'"]');e&&(r=e.querySelector('.kanban-block[id="'+n+'"]'))}}else if("project"===j){const t=Array.from(e.classList).find(e=>e.startsWith("project"));if(t){const e=document.querySelector('.group[data-project-id="'+t+'"]');e&&(r=e.querySelector('.kanban-block[id="'+n+'"]'))}}else r=document.getElementById(n);if(r&&e.parentElement!==r){r.appendChild(e);const t=w.get(e.id);t&&(t.status=n)}})(o,r);else if(r){const e=O(w.get(n)),t=((e,n)=>{if("executor"===j){const r=Array.from(e.classList).find(e=>e.startsWith("user"));if(r){const e=document.querySelector('.group[data-executor-id="'+r+'"]');if(e)return e.querySelector('.kanban-block[id="'+n+'"]')}}else if("project"===j){const r=Array.from(e.classList).find(e=>e.startsWith("project"));if(r){const e=document.querySelector('.group[data-project-id="'+r+'"]');if(e)return e.querySelector('.kanban-block[id="'+n+'"]')}}return document.querySelector('.kanban-block[id="'+n+'"]')})(e,r);t&&(t.appendChild(e),H(e))}})(e)),m(n)},reinitKanban:()=>{o&&(o.parseProjects(),o.updateDisplay()),a&&(a.populateMenu(),a.applyFilter()),c&&c.populateMenu(),n(),M()}};const b=document.getElementById("board-settings");if(b&&b.textContent&&"{}"!==b.textContent.trim())try{m(JSON.parse(b.textContent))}catch(e){console.error("board-settings: Failed to parse JSON:",e)}M()})})();</script></head><body><div id="wrapper" class="wrapper"><div id="main-content-wrapper"><div id="sticky_blok" class="sticky_blok"><div class="command_panel"><div
